nodes.norm_label: session dengan skema bersih + data seed, untuk test service & bot.

nodes.label: Quick-Add Text Parsing
nodes.rationale: Free-text like 'makan 15k' is parsed into a structured transaction; the same parser backs both the Telegram bot and the web /transactions/quick endpoint.

nodes.label: Learning Auto-Categorizer
nodes.rationale: Category is guessed from keywords; correcting a category teaches the categorizer (keyword_rules) so similar future inputs are auto-tagged.

nodes.label: OCR Receipt Pipeline
nodes.rationale: Receipt/e-wallet photo -> store (storage.py) -> LLM Vision extract (ocr.py, _call_vision isolated for tests) -> categorize (Phase 2 categorizer) -> draft transaction; raw LLM output kept in receipts.ocr_raw.

nodes.label: Budgeting & Safe-to-Spend
nodes.rationale: Per-category + total budgets with used/remaining/percent status, safe-to-spend (remaining / days left), projected run-out date, and optional rollover of last month's surplus.

nodes.label: Daily Scheduler Automation
nodes.rationale: One daily APScheduler job at DIGEST_HOUR: run due recurring txs, send daily digest, check 80%/100% budget alerts (once per threshold via budget_alerts), and on the 1st send previous-month review.

nodes.label: Inter-Account Transfer
nodes.rationale: transfer-type tx moves balance source->dest (ledger.py) and is excluded from income/expense analytics and budgets; adds transactions.dest_account_id.

nodes.label: Saving Goals
nodes.rationale: saving_goals model with /goals and /goals/{id}/contribute to track a savings target.

nodes.label: JWT Bearer Authentication
nodes.rationale: POST /auth/login returns a JWT; all endpoints except login/telegram-webhook/health require Authorization: Bearer. Web stores the token in localStorage and clears it on 401.

nodes.label: Single-Origin PWA Serving
nodes.rationale: FastAPI serves the built React PWA from STATIC_DIR with SPA fallback, so web and API share one origin and the client calls relative API paths; public access via Cloudflare Tunnel.

nodes.label: Hand-Drawn SVG Charts
nodes.rationale: Donut and trend charts are drawn by hand with SVG + TOMO color tokens, deliberately avoiding any charting library.

nodes.label: TOMO Tomato Design System
nodes.rationale: Warm editorial identity (Playfair Display + DM Sans, grain, hand-drawn tomato, warm-only palette) with a tomato mascot; mobile-first with a desktop sidebar/multi-column layout.

nodes.label: Total kekayaan bersih = jumlah saldo semua akun.      Transfer & tabungan-goal a
nodes.norm_label: total kekayaan bersih = jumlah saldo semua akun.      transfer & tabungan-goal a
